title: Autopilot Configuration
description: Per-project configuration for autonomous plan execution via GitHub Copilot CLI.

runtime.description: Execution runtime. 'host' = git worktree on host. 'container' = Docker container clone-from-remote. 'sandbox' = Windows Sandbox (isolated Win32, disposable).

copilotAuth.description: How the Copilot CLI authenticates for AI requests.

gitProvider.description: Git hosting provider for clone/push/PR operations.

gitAuth.description: How git remote operations authenticate. 'pat-shared' = same PAT as copilotAuth. 'oauth' = GitHub OAuth token. 'azure-cli' = ADO token from az CLI.

timeout.description: Maximum execution time per phase in minutes.

maxIterationsPerStep.description: Maximum fix-retry iterations before giving up on a step.

build.description: Build command. Must start with an allowed prefix: dotnet build, dotnet publish, npm run, make, cargo build.
build.pattern: ^(dotnet build|dotnet publish|npm run|yarn run|pnpm run|make|cargo build|gradle |mvn )

test.description: Test command. Must start with an allowed prefix: dotnet test, npm test, npm run test, make test, cargo test.
test.pattern: ^(dotnet test|npm test|npm run test|yarn test|pnpm test|make test|cargo test|gradle test|mvn test)

adoOrg.description: Azure DevOps organization URL (required if gitProvider=ado).

adoProject.description: Azure DevOps project name (required if gitProvider=ado).

dockerfileExtensions.description: Additional RUN directives appended to base Dockerfile at build time.
